narrative:
Delhi Twp. township has 20,641 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.8 percentage points.
